name: Sylvester Weaver
abstract: Sylvester Weaver (July 25, 1897 – April 4, 1960) was an American blues guitar player and a pioneer of country blues. He was the son of Walter and Mattie (née Embers or Embry) Weaver.

about_quotes.speaker: Helen Humes
about_quotes.evidence: Mr. Weaver, Sylvester Weaver heard me and had Mr. Rockwell come in here and that was my first record I ever made.
